response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified intro segments and dialogue puppet scene. 2. Identified song 'you' starting at 02:17 via on-screen credits '作詞: 癒月', '作曲: dai'. 3. Performer in video is Haachama. 4. Performed web search using '"you" 癒月 dai Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve lyrics. 5. Compiled metadata and lyrics into JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features an instrumental intro, a brief dialogue segment, and a full vocal performance of the song "you" by the character Haachama.

scenes.description: Instrumental intro followed by 'HORROR LIVE' and 'HAACHAMA WORLD' title cards.
Haachama performs the song 'you' while standing in front of a cherry blossom tree. On-screen text credits '作詞: 癒月', '作曲: dai'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あなたは今どこで何をしていますか？
この空の続く場所にいますか？
今まで私の心を埋めていた
初めての気持ち
全部あなたから教わった
失って初めて気がついた
こんなにも私を支えてくれたこと
こんなにも笑顔をくれたこと
失ってしまった代償は
とてつもなく大きすぎて
取り戻そうと必死に
手を伸ばしてもがくけれど
零れて風のようにすり抜けて
届きそうで届かない
孤独と絶望に胸を締め付けられ
心が壊れそうになるけれど
思い出に残るあなたの笑顔が
私をいつも励ましてくれる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Where are you, and what are you doing right now?
Are you in a place where this sky continues?
The very first feeling that had filled my heart until now
You taught me everything
I realized it only after losing you
That you had supported me this much
That you had given me this much of your smile
The price of having lost you
Is too enormous
I try desperately to take it back
I reach out my hand and struggle
But it spills out and slips through like the wind
It feels like it will reach, but it doesn't
My chest is tightened by loneliness and despair
And though my heart is about to break
Your smile that remains in my memories
Always encourages me
